top_claims.claim: In the most recent quarter, the Advertising Technology segment, which is largely comprised of Smadex, achieved a dramatic inflection in their revenue and profits as a sizable Hong Kong gaming company significantly increased spending on Smadex.

For example, at the end of the month Dah Sing Banking Group, a second-tier bank in Hong Kong, posted very good results: increasing net interest income and margins, a 28% increase in fee income, flat/falling credit impairment costs, and a 20% increase in div.

Chinese markets were sluggish across the board, with A-shares declining 2%, Hong Kong declining 3%, and Chinese tech stocks falling 20%, reflecting persistent macro headwinds against a backdrop of valuations that are no longer as compelling as they were several years ago.
Update 4/28/26 - Wubo Technology Hong Kong listing/spin-off was approved by the board but remains subject to shareholder approval.
